name: Flex
description: Flexbox wrapper exposing direction, gap, align, justify as props.

api.name: Flex
api.description: Flexbox wrapper exposing direction, gap, align, justify as props.

parameters.name: Direction
parameters.description: Flex-direction keyword appended to the flex- Tailwind prefix (e.g. "row", "col", "row-reverse"). Defaults to "row".

parameters.name: Gap
parameters.description: Tailwind spacing scale suffix appended to gap- (e.g. "2", "4") to space out the children. Omitted when null/empty.

parameters.name: Align
parameters.description: Cross-axis alignment keyword appended to items- (e.g. "center", "start", "stretch"). Omitted when null/empty.

parameters.name: Justify
parameters.description: Main-axis distribution keyword appended to justify- (e.g. "between", "center", "end"). Omitted when null/empty.

parameters.name: Wrap
parameters.description: When true, adds flex-wrap so children wrap onto multiple lines instead of overflowing.

parameters.name: Inline
parameters.description: When true, renders as inline-flex instead of flex, so the container sits inline with surrounding content.

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: The flex items rendered inside the container.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the container.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Captures any unmatched attributes and applies them to the container.

examples.title: With Spacer
examples.code:
<Flex Align="center">
    <Text Weight="semibold">Logo</Text>
    <Spacer />
    <Flex Gap="2">
        <Button Variant="Button.ButtonVariant.Ghost" Size="Button.ButtonSize.Sm">About</Button>
        <Button Size="Button.ButtonSize.Sm">Sign In</Button>
    </Flex>
</Flex>

examples.title: Centered
examples.code:
<Flex Align="center" Justify="center" Class="h-32 w-full">
    <Text Color="muted">Centered content</Text>
</Flex>

slots.name: ChildContent
slots.description: The flex items rendered inside the container.

mdSummary:
# Flex

Flexbox wrapper exposing direction, gap, align, justify as props.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Layout
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/flex

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Flex | Direction | `string?` | `"row"` | Flex-direction keyword appended to the flex- Tailwind prefix (e.g. "row", "col", "row-reverse"). Defaults to "row". |
| Flex | Gap | `string?` | `` | Tailwind spacing scale suffix appended to gap- (e.g. "2", "4") to space out the children. Omitted when null/empty. |
| Flex | Align | `string?` | `` | Cross-axis alignment keyword appended to items- (e.g. "center", "start", "stretch"). Omitted when null/empty. |
| Flex | Justify | `string?` | `` | Main-axis distribution keyword appended to justify- (e.g. "between", "center", "end"). Omitted when null/empty. |
| Flex | Wrap | `bool` | `` | When true, adds flex-wrap so children wrap onto multiple lines instead of overflowing. |
| Flex | Inline | `bool` | `` | When true, renders as inline-flex instead of flex, so the container sits inline with surrounding content. |
| Flex | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` | The flex items rendered inside the container. |
| Flex | Class | `string?` | `` | Additional CSS classes merged onto the container. |
| Flex | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` | Captures any unmatched attributes and applies them to the container. |

## Slots
- `ChildContent` (Flex) — The flex items rendered inside the container.

## Events
- (none)

## Sub-components
- (none)

## Cascading values it expects
- (none)

## Services it injects
- (none)

## Keyboard
—

## Example
```razor
<Flex />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-foreground`

## Files
- `UI/Flex/Flex.razor`
